title: Business associate professionals n.e.c.
description: Plan, direct, or coordinate activities designed to create or maintain a favorable public image or raise issue awareness for their organization or client. Plan, direct, or coordinate activities to solicit and maintain funds for special projects or nonprofit organizations. Plan, direct, or coordinate one or more administrative services of an organization, such as records and information management, mail distribution, and other office support services.
